content:
Hello, today I had an orange pi 5 board I was looking into the supported os, and looks like this board is lacking kernel support https://forum.manjaro.org/t/support-for-orange-pi-5/130833

So I was thinking that I already had the hardware and I can play with rust to get something done, but I do not know anything about this board, so there is someone that had some news regarding this? or where I can find something related to it?
